freshnessTargets: Use a non-legacy scene program (e.g., micro_purchase, return_or_repair)
Shift location away from indoor_desk_corner to a less used archetype like park_bench or transit_stop
Choose an object family other than accessory, like snack_item or textile
avoidMotifs: Overusing reflective_support weather role; try texture_modifier or ambient_sound
Ending caption with soft_observation; experiment with private_omen or quiet_completion
narrativeNudges: Focus on a forward-looking small action rather than rediscovery of past items
Incorporate a subtle interaction with the environment (e.g., sound, texture change)
Keep emotional landing gentle but with a hint of shy_attachment or tiny_reset
captionAdvice: Start with a present-moment sensory detail (e.g., sound, touch) not related to rain or wind
Use short sentences with one slightly longer breath for rhythm
End with a private, forward-looking thought rather than a general observation
imageAdvice: Frame to show partial presence with focus on hands or object interaction
Use natural, soft lighting to match late_evening mood
Avoid cluttered backgrounds; keep scene simple and intimate
summary: Shift from repetitive selfie streak and legacy indoor rediscovery to a gentle, forward-looking life_record scene with a fresh location and object, maintaining intimate tone while avoiding overused motifs.
